mapper.sql: s.song_id, s.song_name, s.duration, s.album_id, s.create_at, s.status, a.album_name AS album_name, a.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.play_count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT art.artist_id ORDER BY sa.artist_id DESC) AS artist_ids, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT art.artist_name ORDER BY sa.artist_id DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS artist_names

s.song_id, s.song_name, s.duration, s.album_id, s.play_count, s.lyrics, s.like_count, s.create_at, a.album_name AS album_name, a.cover_url AS coverUrl, -- 歌手信息（role_type=0） GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 0 THEN art.artist_id END) AS artist_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 0 THEN art.artist_name END SEPARATOR ',') AS artist_names, -- 作词人（role_type=1） GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 1 THEN art.artist_id END) AS lyricist_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 1 THEN art.artist_name END SEPARATOR ',') AS lyricist_names, -- 作曲人（role_type=2） GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 2 THEN art.artist_id END) AS composer_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 2 THEN art.artist_name END SEPARATOR ',')
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT song_id FROM song_artist WHERE artist_id = #{artistId} AND role_type = 0) AS target_songs INNER JOIN song s ON target_songs.song_id = s.song_id INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.song_id = sa.song_id AND sa.role_type = 0 INNER JOIN artist art ON sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.play_count DESC

SELECT
FROM song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id and sa.role_type = 0 inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.album_id = #{id} and s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.create_at DESC

SELECT
FROM song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id and sa.role_type = 0 inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.album_id = #{albumId} GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.create_at DESC

SELECT
FROM song s INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.song_id = sa.song_id AND sa.role_type = 0 INNER JOIN artist art ON sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id LEFT JOIN song_daily_play_count sdpc ON s.song_id = sdpc.song_id AND sdpc.play_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(sdpc.play_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 0,100

SELECT
FROM song s INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.song_id = sa.song_id AND sa.role_type = 0 INNER JOIN artist art ON sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id LEFT JOIN song_daily_play_count sdpc ON s.song_id = sdpc.song_id AND sdpc.play_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(sdpc.play_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 0,100

SELECT
from song_playlist sp inner join song s on sp.song_id = s.song_id and sp.playlist_id = #{id} inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id and sa.role_type = 0 inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id inner join album a on s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.play_count DESC

SELECT
from song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id and sa.role_type = 0 inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id inner join album a on s.album_id = a.album_id where song_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') and s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.play_count DESC

SELECT
FROM song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id inner join album a on s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.song_id = #{id} and s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id

SELECT
, s.status FROM song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id inner join album a on s.album_id = a.album_id WHERE s.song_id = #{id} GROUP BY s.song_id

SELECT
from song s inner join song_artist sa on s.song_id = sa.song_id and sa.role_type = 0 inner join artist art on sa.artist_id = art.artist_id inner join album a on s.album_id = a.album_id where s.lyrics like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') and s.status = 0 GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY s.play_count DESC

SELECT s.song_id, s.song_name, s.duration, s.album_id, s.lyrics, s.like_count, s.play_count, s.create_at, a.album_name, a.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.status, sa.artist_ids, sa.artist_names, sa.lyricist_names, sa.composer_names FROM song s INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT sa.song_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 0 THEN a.artist_id END) AS artist_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 0 THEN a.artist_name END) AS artist_names, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 1 THEN a.artist_name END) AS lyricist_names, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sa.role_type = 2 THEN a.artist_name END) AS composer_names FROM song_artist sa INNER JOIN artist a ON sa.artist_id = a.artist_id GROUP BY sa.song_id ) sa ON s.song_id = sa.song_id
AND s.song_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{songPageDTO.songName}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM song_artist sa2 INNER JOIN artist a2 ON sa2.artist_id = a2.artist_id WHERE sa2.song_id = s.song_id AND a2.artist_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{songPageDTO.artistName}, '%') )
AND s.status = #{songPageDTO.status}

SELECT
FROM song s INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.song_id = sa.song_id AND sa.role_type = 0 INNER JOIN artist art ON sa.artist_id = art.artist_id INNER JOIN album a ON s.album_id = a.album_id LEFT JOIN song_daily_play_count sdpc ON s.song_id = sdpc.song_id AND sdpc.play_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) WHERE s.status = 0 AND s.create_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY s.song_id ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(sdpc.play_count), 0) DESC LIMIT 0,100
